text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title "Efficient evolution of human antibodies from general protein language models" published in Nature Biotechnology (2023), and the authors listed on the Kim Lab website (Brian L. Hie, Varun R. Shanker, Duo Xu, Theodora U. J. Bruun, Payton A. Weidenbacher, Shaogeng Tang, Wesley Wu, John E. Pak, Peter S. Kim) substantially match the cited authors. Note that "John Kuriyan" appears in the cited reference but not in the published author list — this is a minor discrepancy that does not invalidate the reference overall. The year cited as 2024 is slightly off; it was published online in 2023 but may have appeared in the 2024 volume of the journal.
LINK: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41587-023-01763-2
